context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the mix-tasks-generators instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always call `Mix.Task.run("app.start")` first** — tasks that access the database or Repo need the app started

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Create custom tasks for project-specific workflows** — don't override standard Mix tasks

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use transactions for data modifications** — wrap `Repo.insert_all`, `Repo.delete_all` in `Repo.transaction()`

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Follow `Mix.Tasks.Namespace.TaskName` naming** — file path must match: `lib/mix/tasks/namespace.task_name.ex`

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Create file** — create `lib/mix/tasks/<namespace>.<task_name>.ex`

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define module** — use `defmodule Mix.Tasks.MyApp.TaskName do use Mix.Task`

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify** — run `mix help | grep task_name` to confirm registration

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: mix my_app.migrate up      - Run migrations
